allow: PowerShell($json = \(Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing -Uri "https://api.github.com/repos/Cognigy/Extensions/contents/extensions"\).Content | ConvertFrom-Json; $json | Where-Object { $_.name -match "service|knowledge|sharepoint|confluence|crawl|web" } | Select-Object name, type)

PowerShell($pkg = Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing -Uri "https://registry.npmjs.org/@cognigy/extension-tools/latest"; \($pkg.Content | ConvertFrom-Json\) | Select-Object name, version, description, main, types | Format-List)

PowerShell($src = "$env:TEMP\\cognigy-extension-tools.tgz"; $dst = "$env:TEMP\\cognigy-extension-tools"; if \(Test-Path $dst\) { Remove-Item $dst -Recurse -Force }; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $dst | Out-Null; tar -xzf $src -C $dst; Get-ChildItem $dst -Recurse | Select-Object FullName)

PowerShell($tar = "C:\\Users\\markle\\OneDrive - NICE Ltd\\Desktop\\Demo Stuff\\Knowledge Connectors\\service-now-knowledge\\service-now-knowledge.tar.gz"; if \(Test-Path $tar\) { $info = Get-Item $tar; "{0,-50} {1,10:N0} bytes  {2}" -f $info.Name, $info.Length, $info.LastWriteTime } else { "MISSING" }; tar -tzf $tar)

PowerShell($dir = 'C:\\Users\\markle\\OneDrive - NICE Ltd\\Documents\\GitHub\\Extensions\\extensions\\service-now'; Push-Location $dir; npm run build 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 60; "exit=$LASTEXITCODE"; Pop-Location)
